candidate_check.description: The ESXi host Secure Shell (SSH) daemon must set a timeout count on idle sessions.

check_content_excerpt:
From an ESXi shell, run the following command:

# /usr/lib/vmware/openssh/bin/sshd -T|grep clientalivecountmax

Expected result:

clientalivecountmax 3

If the output does not match the expected result, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
From an ESXi shell, add or correct the following line in "/etc/ssh/sshd_config":

ClientAliveCountMax 3
title: The ESXi host Secure Shell (SSH) daemon must set a timeout count on idle sessions.
